name: whatsapp-reminder-system
description: A WhatsApp reminder system for LIC premium notifications

scripts.help: node -e "console.log('WhatsApp Reminder System Help:'); console.log('npm run setup - Create directories and example files'); console.log('npm start - Start in development mode'); console.log('npm run pm2 - Start in production mode'); console.log('npm run pm2:logs - View production logs'); console.log('npm run pm2:restart - Restart production'); console.log('npm run pm2:stop - Stop production'); console.log(''); console.log('API Endpoints:'); console.log('  /health - System health check'); console.log('  /metrics - System metrics'); console.log('  /logs - View logs'); console.log('  /status - System status'); console.log('  /config - Configuration management'); console.log(''); console.log('Excel File Format:'); console.log('  Policy Number, Customer Name, Phone Number, Premium Amount, Due Date'); console.log('  Optional: Policy Status, Email, Policy Type, Premium Frequency'); console.log(''); console.log('Place Excel files in: data/excel/'); console.log('For production: Use PM2 with ecosystem.config.js');"
